input: user-item interaction graphs from two domains, item descriptions (for NTM)
output: predicted ratings for items in each domain
backbone: GNN (graph neural network) with DCCA (deep canonical correlation analysis)
loss: not explicitly stated (likely rating prediction loss + DCCA correlation loss)
key_idea: construct separate user-user and item-topic graphs per domain, then use DCCA to transfer knowledge between domains via both overlapping users and latent item topics
